analysis.reasoning: The tweet emphasizes Venezuela's sovereignty and Russia's solidarity against perceived Western (US) pressure, signaling support for a non-Western, sovereignty-respecting stance and portraying Russia as a benevolent partner. This aligns with RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system outside Western influence) and RU3 (Russia as a benevolent partner). It does not explicitly frame the West as immoral (RU1) nor focus on culture/history (RU4-RU6).
